entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A large multi-parental back cross nested association mapping population used as the case study for phenomic prediction

entities.name: GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: A method used to increase plant breeding efficiency by predicting traits based on genomic data

entities.name: PHENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: A complementary approach to genomic prediction that uses phenomic data to predict traits

entities.name: NEAR INFRARED REFLECTANCE SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to acquire spectral features for phenomic prediction

entities.description: Genetic markers used as features for genomic prediction

entities.name: SPECTRA PREPROCESSING
entities.description: The process of preparing spectral data before it is used in prediction models

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The genetic organization of the population which can influence the accuracy of predictions

entities.name: TRAINING SET SIZE
entities.description: The number of samples used to train the prediction models

entities.name: ACQUISITION ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The environment in which NIRS data is collected, which can impact prediction

entities.name: WAVELENGTH SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting specific wavelengths from NIRS spectra for prediction

entities.name: STATISTICAL METHODS
entities.description: The mathematical approaches used to perform trait predictions

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: An environmental challenge that plant breeding aims to address

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing crop varieties to support food and feed value chains

entities.name: PREDICTIVE ABILITIES
entities.description: The measure of the accuracy and performance of prediction methods
